emotional_tone: Professional, authoritative, data-driven, and highly precise. Designed for B2B real estate professionals who need a tool as serious as Ahrefs or Semrush.

typography.font_install_instructions: Add Cabinet Grotesk (from Fontshare or local assets) for headings, and Google Font 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Fallbacks: sans-serif for body.

anti_patterns: NO soft, fluffy drop shadows. Use hard 1px borders instead.
NO rounded-xl or rounded-2xl on main cards. Stick to rounded-sm or rounded-md.

layout_spacing.strategy: High density, clear data correlation, highly scannable.

alignment.general: Left-align text and data. Right-align numeric columns in tables.
alignment.headers: Left-align section headers with an adjacent overline.

header_nav.style: Solid background with a hard bottom border.

data_tables.header: bg-slate-50 border-b border-slate-200 text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider

buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#001D6B] rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors

inputs.default: border border-slate-300 rounded-md px-3 py-2 bg-white text-slate-900 placeholder-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7]/30 focus:border-[#002FA7] transition-all

shadcn_overrides: Override default Card component to use `rounded-md`, `border-slate-200`, and `shadow-sm` instead of larger default radii/shadows.
For Data Tables, strictly use right alignment for all numeric/metric columns.
Tabs: Use a minimal underline style instead of the default pill/button style for a more professional SaaS look.

motion_interactions.hover: Subtle border color shifts (slate-200 to slate-300) and slight background tints. No extreme scaling or floating.
motion_interactions.loaders: Linear progress bars or minimal spinners in brand accent color.

icons.style: Weight 'regular' or 'bold' for active states. Size 20px (w-5 h-5) for standard use, 16px (w-4 h-4) for dense data rows.

images.description: Abstract white geometric background for the login/registration split screen side.

media.rules: No placeholder URLs. For avatars, use initial-based colored circles.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against white/grey backgrounds passes WCAG AA (minimum 4.5:1). Functional colors (red/green) must be legible against white.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, metric cards) MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="site-selector-dropdown"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard using a 'Control Room' approach. Rely heavily on Grid layouts (`grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4`).
Ensure the Sidebar navigation visually separates the active 'Logirent' or 'Logitime' context. A dropdown context switcher should be prominent at the top of the sidebar.
Implement the 'Vue Performance' mock with Recharts, using high-contrast colors (#002FA7 for impressions, #16A34A for clicks).
Do NOT use HTML `<select>` or `<input type="date">`. Rely completely on customized Shadcn Select, Dialog, and Calendar primitives.
Keep spacing structured but not fluffy. Use `p-6` for main containers, tight `gap-4` between widgets.
Use French language strictly for all UI text.
